Trending: Storm watch Game tonight Road closures

Local Library Extends Evening Hours

The central branch will stay open until nine on weekdays starting next month, the library board announced Tuesday. The change follows a year-long pilot during which evening visits rose forty percent.

Funding comes from the approved operating levy, and no weekend hours change.
